title: leonurus artemisia
intro: Leonurus artemisia, also known as Sweet Woodruff or Woodruff, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Leonurus artemisia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Leonurus artemisia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or used externally as a topical application to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
